description: Template for visualizing the arc of a user's relationship with Ferni

milestones.title: First Hello
milestones.description: The conversation that started it all
milestones.quote: I've never really talked to anyone like this before...

milestones.title: First Real Talk
milestones.quote: I haven't told anyone this, but...

milestones.title: Met Maya
milestones.quote: Maya seems really helpful for the routine stuff

milestones.title: The Pattern Revealed
milestones.description: First 'I notice' moment that resonated deeply
milestones.quote: How did you know that? I never even realized...

milestones.title: The Breakthrough
milestones.quote: I think something actually changed today

milestones.title: 100 Conversations
milestones.quote: I can't imagine not having these talks now

milestones.title: Full Circle
milestones.quote: It's like having a whole support system

turningPoints.title: The Decision
turningPoints.before: Stuck in a cycle of indecision about career
turningPoints.after: Finally made the choice to pursue the opportunity
turningPoints.ferniRole: Helped see the pattern of avoidance

turningPoints.title: The Reconnection
turningPoints.before: 847 days of silence with old friend
turningPoints.after: Rebuilt the bridge with one vulnerable message
turningPoints.ferniRole: Kept gently reminding about the unsaid

topicEvolution.insight: Work stress dominated early conversations. As trust built, health and relationships emerged as the real priorities.

emotionalArc.insight: The dip in week 3 preceded a breakthrough. Your pattern: discomfort often comes before growth.
